string.name: Reason_File
string.value: Operate file in application file system

string.name: Tips_Please_enter_the_email_type_in_the_correct_format_such_as_email
string.value: Tips:请输入正确格式的邮箱类型，例如@qq.com或者@163.com

string.name: The_dialog_box_has_been_closed_and_the_option_to_enter_a_different_type_of_email_has_been_unselected
string.value: 关闭了对话框，取消选输入其它类型邮箱

string.name: Email_type_must_contain_one_and_can_only_contain_one
string.value: 邮箱类型必须含有一个@，且只能含有一个@

string.name: The_email_type_must_contain_a_And_it_can_only_contain_one
string.value: 邮箱类型必须含有一个.，且只能含有一个.

string.name: In_email_types_needs_to_be_before_such_as_mail
string.value: 邮箱类型中@需要在.之前，例如@qq.com,@163.com这些

string.name: Except_for_and_in_email_types_Must_contain_other_characters
string.value: 邮箱类型中除了@和.，必须含有其它字符

string.name: must_be_first_in_the_email_type
string.value: 邮箱类型中@必须在首一位

string.name: Click_on_the_email_after_the_account_to_switch_email_types
string.value: 点击账号后面的邮箱可以切换邮箱类型

string.name: Do_you_want_to_enable_SSL_TLS_tip
string.value: 是否开启SSL/TLS(当前仅需支持SMTP,无需支持SMTPS,此按钮暂不可用)

string.name: Currently_only_SMTP_support_is_required_no_SMTPS_support_is_needed
string.value: 当前仅需支持SMTP,无需支持SMTPS

string.name: Account_already_logged_in_no_need_to_login_again
string.value: 账号已登录，无需重新登录

string.name: This_is_the_text_of_the_OpenHarmony_email_for_testing
string.value: 这是测试的鸿蒙邮件正文，邮件的收件人，抄送，密件抄送的格式为：someone <someone@your-email.com>, another <another@your-email.com>，多个账号以英文逗号,连接。

string.name: Format
string.value: Format: xx<xx@yxx.com>, xx<xx@yxx.com> Multiple accounts are connected by commas in English.

string.name: Large_attachments_need_to_be_manually_pushed_into_the_device_sandbox
string.value: 大附件需要手动推入设备沙箱，多个大附件仅选取首一个

string.name: Account_not_logged_in_please_login_again
string.value: 账号未登录，请需重新登录

string.name: Start_detecting_large_attachments_in_the_cache_directory
string.value: 开始检测cache目录下的大附件

string.name: Start_generating_a_single_local_file
string.value: 开始生成单个本地文件

string.name: Please_check_the_information_sent_from_the_client_to_the_server
string.value: 客户端发送到服务端的信息，请查收

string.name: Successfully_generated_local_single_file
string.value: 生成本地单个文件成功

string.name: Failed_to_generate_local_single_file
string.value: 开始生成单个本地文件

string.name: Currently_only_supports_testing_text
string.value: 暂时只支持测试文本，图片，文档，表格，其它类型的文件等待测试开放

string.value: 生成本地单个文件失败:
